signals.raw:
NO** | **MED** confidence  

Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% on Apr 10 (7th meeting), citing inflation above 2% target from oil shocks and weak won; March CPI confirms contained pressures pre-Middle East volatility, unlikely to shift prediction markets without new policy moves.[1][3] IMF forecasts 2.5% for 2026; no resolutions or confirmations since.[5]
